summary: Added `ticks` field to task objects in STATE.json that increments on every `→ in-progress` transition, tracking total agent dispatches including retries. Backward-compatible: old tasks without `ticks` default to 0. Added 8 unit tests in test/oscillation-ticks.test.mjs covering first dispatch, retries, blocked recovery, non-increment on other transitions, per-task isolation, and accumulation across multiple dispatches.
